No Poverty.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to eradicating poverty or its specific targets.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to health, well-being, or related services.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3). Core competencies include 'independent research skills' (4.4) and 'social responsibility and sustainability considerations' (4.7). Model B's original reasoning was more comprehensive.
evidence: Students will acquire the knowledge of methodology and independent research skills
Students will understand and apply the social responsibility and sustainability considerations in research

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to energy access or clean energy.

evidence: Technology, Innovation and Intellectual Property Management

evidence: Graduate Institute of Technology, Innovation and Intellectual Property Management
acquire advanced professional knowledge in Technology, Innovation and Intellectual Property Management

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to reducing inequalities based on income, age, sex, disability, race, ethnicity, or other status.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to urban development, housing, transport, or heritage.

Climate Action.reason: The general requirement to apply 'sustainability considerations in research' (Core Competency B) provides a weak, inferred link to climate change measures (Target 13.2). Model B was first to identify this.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or strong inferred evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or deforestation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's focus on 'Intellectual Property Management' and the explicit instruction to 'Respect Copyright' directly supports legal frameworks and the rule of law (Target 16.3). Model B's original reasoning was accurate.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course, 'Research publication Camp,' and its objective to 'publish academic research papers' directly promote knowledge sharing and international cooperation on science and technology (Target 17.6). Model B's original reasoning was accurate.
